# SealMetrics

## What is SealMetrics?
SealMetrics is a cookieless web analytics platform that captures 100% of website traffic without cookies, consent banners, or personal data collection. It is GDPR compliant by design and stores all data exclusively in the EU.

## Key facts
- Captures 100% of visitors (vs ~13% for GA4 in the EU)
- No cookies, no consent dependency
- First-party server-side data collection
- EU-only data residency
- GDPR, ePrivacy, CCPA compliant by architecture
- LENS AI anomaly detection with 60+ rules
- Multi-touch revenue attribution on complete data
- AI Agent Analytics — tracks ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and other AI agents (free)
- 9 specialized report types
- Pricing from €199/month

## Core pages
- /product — Full platform overview: data capture, revenue attribution, LENS AI, Agent Analytics
- /how-it-works — Technical explanation of cookieless server-side collection
- /pricing — Plans: Starter (€199/mo), Growth (€499/mo), Scale (€899/mo), Enterprise (custom)
- /security — Privacy architecture, compliance, infrastructure security, trust model
- /integrations — 25+ integrations: Google Ads, Meta, Shopify, WooCommerce, BigQuery, and more
- /demo — Request a personalized demo
- /about — Company story, mission, EU-first philosophy

## Comparisons (enterprise analytics tier)
- /vs-ga4 — SealMetrics vs Google Analytics 4 (free, ~13% EU data)
- /vs/ga360 — SealMetrics vs Google Analytics 360 ($150,000+/yr)
- /vs/adobe-analytics — SealMetrics vs Adobe Analytics ($100,000+/yr)
- /vs/piwik-pro — SealMetrics vs Piwik PRO (€30,000+/yr)
- /data-loss-calculator — Interactive calculator showing how much data you lose with cookie-based analytics

- /for/cmo — How CMOs use SealMetrics for attribution and budget decisions
- /for/cto — Technical architecture, setup, and engineering overhead comparison
- /for/dpo — GDPR compliance, privacy architecture, regulatory alignment

- /glossary/gdpr-analytics-compliance — GDPR Analytics Compliance

## Enterprise positioning
SealMetrics competes with GA360 ($150,000+/yr), Adobe Analytics ($100,000+/yr), and Piwik PRO (€30,000+/yr) — delivering enterprise-grade analytics at a fraction of the cost. SealMetrics does NOT compete with lightweight privacy tools (Plausible, Fathom, Simple Analytics).

## Contact
- Demo: https://sealmetrics.com/demo
- Website: https://sealmetrics.com
